info.description: Intelligent scheduling system for UK personal trainers.
info.title: PT Scheduler API

post.description: Sends a password reset email if the account exists. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Authenticates a user and returns access + refresh tokens.
Issues a new access token from a valid refresh token.
Creates a coach or client account and returns access + refresh tokens.
Sets a new password using a single-use reset token (valid 1 hour).
Manually triggers the monthly billing charge for a client. Idempotent — safe to call multiple times for the same billing period.

409.description: Already charged for this billing period

get.description: Returns the time windows the client prefers for their sessions.

put.description: Replaces all preferred time windows for the client. Provide the full set on every call.

get.description: Returns a client's profile including their sessions-per-month quota and priority score.

put.description: Updates a client's full name, phone, and timezone.

get.description: Returns the coach's declared working hours for each day of the week.

put.description: Replaces all working-hour slots for the coach. Provide the full weekly schedule on every call.

get.description: Returns the public profile of a coach, including business name and user details.

put.description: Updates the coach's business name, full name, phone, and timezone.

get.description: Returns all data held for the currently authenticated user as a JSON document (GDPR right of access).

post.description: Starts a GoCardless redirect flow for Direct Debit setup. FRONTEND: redirect the client to the returned redirect_url.
Finalises a GoCardless redirect flow after the client has authorised the Direct Debit mandate.
Creates a Stripe SetupIntent so the client can save their card without an immediate charge. FRONTEND: use the returned client_secret to initialise Stripe Elements.
Runs the OR-Tools solver for the given week and returns proposed sessions for the coach to review.

get.description: Returns a schedule run and its proposed or confirmed sessions.

post.description: Coach approves the proposed schedule. All proposed sessions become confirmed. Notifications are enqueued.
Coach rejects the proposed schedule. All proposed sessions are soft-deleted.

get.description: Coaches see all sessions across their clients. Clients see their own sessions. Filter by status with ?status=proposed|confirmed|cancelled|completed.

post.description: Outside 24h window: cancels immediately and issues a credit. Inside 24h window: moves to pending_cancellation and notifies the coach to decide. Check within_24h_window in the response to know which path was taken.
Coach confirms the client loses the session. No credit is issued. Only valid when session is in pending_cancellation status.
Coach waives the 24h policy. Session is cancelled and a session credit is issued to the client. Only valid when session is in pending_cancellation status.
Receives and verifies GoCardless webhook events. Authenticated by Webhook-Signature header HMAC, not JWT.
Receives and verifies Stripe webhook events. Authenticated by Stripe-Signature header HMAC, not JWT.
Receives inbound SMS messages from clients via Twilio. Parses availability and updates the client's preferred windows. Replies with TwiML. Authenticated by Twilio HMAC (X-Twilio-Signature), not JWT.

redirect_url.description: FRONTEND: redirect client to this URL

BearerAuth.description: Enter "Bearer " followed by your access token
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
